description_long: This is a display sword with a slightly curved, single-edged blade that has a metallic sheen and a faint blue-green edge, suggesting a stylized or fantasy design. The blade is mounted on a black display stand with a rectangular base and two vertical supports, which cradle the sword horizontally. The handle is straight, black, and features visible rivets, with a gold-colored guard and pommel, and a small loop or ring attached near the guard. The guard is angular and gold, providing a visual contrast to the otherwise dark handle. A metallic plaque is affixed to the front of the stand, likely for labeling or decorative purposes. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on clean lines and contrasting colors.
description: A sleek, curved sword with a metallic blade and black handle, displayed horizontally on a black stand with a gold guard and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade, black handle with gold guard, and the display stand with a visible plaque.
description_view_1: Front view showing the sword's tip aligned with the center of the stand, highlighting the thickness of the blade and the circular end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the blade's curve, handle, and stand from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle's end and the back of the stand, with the blade's edge barely visible.
attribute_handle_design: straight, black, riveted, gold pommel and guard, minimal ergonomic shaping
